docs.title: Bitbucket Server CLI
docs.text:
bb is a Go CLI for automating Bitbucket Server/Data Center workflows.

This docs site is the public entry point for command usage and release-versioned documentation.

docs.title: What is included now
docs.text:
• Core install and auth flow
  • Runtime configuration and output contract overview
  • Path to deeper command reference content

docs.title: Current status
docs.text: This is groundwork documentation for the first public release wave. Detailed command-by-command guides will be added in follow-up sessions.

docs.title: Command Focus
docs.text: The CLI centers around grouped commands for discoverability and consistency.

docs.title: Discovery-first usage
docs.text:
Use top-level search for cross-project discovery:

go run ./cmd/bb search repos --name demo
go run ./cmd/bb search prs --state OPEN

Detailed reference pages will be added as part of the next documentation pass.

docs.title: Install
docs.text:
Download a release artifact, extract bb, and run:

./bb --help

docs.title: Authenticate
docs.text:
go run ./cmd/bb auth login --host http://localhost:7990 --username admin --password admin
go run ./cmd/bb auth status

docs.title: Machine mode
docs.text:
Use --json for machine-readable responses:

go run ./cmd/bb --json auth status

Envelope contract is bb.machine on version v2.
